title: hieracium murorum subsp. distendens
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. distendens is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, commonly known as wall hawkweed. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. distendens are believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to treat conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and skin irritations.
